summary: Two breast-cancer regulatory moves drove the 25 June 2026 briefing: palbociclib maintenance and the FDA approval of ASCENT-04 / KEYNOTE-D19.
provenance: Derived from the current working tree with the July 2026 Tregzi addition removed to recreate the 25 June 2026 dashboard state.

headlines.title: FDA opens a new palbociclib maintenance option in HER2-positive disease
headlines.summary: The 24 June 2026 decision created a PATINA-driven treatment record for HR-positive, HER2-positive advanced breast cancer.

headlines.title: ASCENT-04 completes the conference-to-label path
headlines.summary: Sacituzumab govitecan plus pembrolizumab moved from ASCO evidence to FDA-approved first-line TNBC therapy.

headlines.title: Ibrance now points straight to the new palbociclib dossier
headlines.summary: Brand-name search resolves the newer record without making users know the generic first.
